rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M. MCRAY et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Plaintiffs Counsel
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 15, 2012 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant Aurora Pumps Company¿s motion to disqualify Plaintiff¿s counsel: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
